content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Fox And Snake". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/510/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and m, which represent the number of rows and columns in the grid. The following n lines contain a string of length m, representing the grid.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the number of '#' characters in the grid after the operations are performed.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Simulate the process of filling the grid according to the given rules.
